zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Oldcastle於大約1368年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾阿爾梅勒時，她的父親Richard Oldcastle42歲，母親Alice Pembridge37歲。她於1389年與Thomas Bromwich在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於從1421年1月10日到1422年1月9日在英國賀福爾維奧布利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Oldcastle于大约1368年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾阿爾梅勒时，她的父亲Richard Oldcastle42岁，母亲Alice Pembridge37岁。她于1389年与Thomas Bromwich在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于从1421年1月10日到1422年1月9日在英国賀福爾維奧布利。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Oldcastle was born about 1368, in Almeley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Oldcastle, was 42 and her mother, Alice Pembridge, was 37. She married Thomas Bromwich in 1389, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died from 10 January 1421 to 9 January 1422, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Oldcastle est née environ 1368, à Almeley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Oldcastle, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Pembridge, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bromwich en 1389, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée du 10 janvier 1421 au 9 janvier 1422, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Oldcastleが約1368年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアルメリーで生まれた時，父Richard Oldcastleは42歳，母Alice Pembridgeは37歳であった。1389年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでThomas Bromwichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はから1421年1月10日まで1422年1月9日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Oldcastle(이)가 대략 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 알리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Oldcastle(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Pembridge(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1389년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Thomas Bromwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 1월 10일부터 1422년 1월 9일까지 영국 허퍼드실르 베오블리에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Oldcastle родилась около 1368 г. в местности алмели, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Oldcastle было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Pembridge, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bromwich в 1389 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла с 10 января 1421 по 9 января 1422 в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия.
